prop-1.author: Emma L.
prop-1.comment: Brilliant location just minutes from campus. The room was spotless on move-in day and the team sorted a maintenance request within hours.

prop-1.author: James K.
prop-1.comment: Love the cinema room and study lounges. Bills included makes budgeting so much easier as an international student.

prop-2.author: Sophie R.
prop-2.comment: Minimalist design with everything you need. The rooftop terrace is perfect for relaxing after lectures.

prop-2.author: Lucas M.
prop-2.comment: Bike storage and fast Wi-Fi were big wins for me. Berlin feels very accessible from here.

prop-3.author: Olivia T.
prop-3.comment: Pool and gym are well maintained. Great social atmosphere without being too noisy during exam season.

prop-3.author: Noah P.
prop-3.comment: Spacious common areas and friendly resident advisors. Short walk to public transport made commuting easy.

prop-4.author: Aoife B.
prop-4.comment: Feels very secure and the study pods are ideal for group projects. Dublin city centre is right on the doorstep.

prop-4.author: Daniel W.
prop-4.comment: Rooftop lounge has amazing views. Monthly billing was straightforward and the team answered all my visa questions.
